# wheretopark.sg

> wheretopark.sg is a free web app that helps drivers in Singapore find and
> compare carpark rates and live availability before they leave. It ranks the
> cheapest carparks near any destination using official rate data and live lot
> counts, so you know where to park before you drive.

## What it does

- Search any Singapore destination (mall, address, postcode, or landmark) and
  see nearby carparks ranked cheapest-first.
- Estimated parking cost for how long you plan to stay (cap-aware), for
  weekdays, Saturdays and Sundays/public holidays.
- Live lot availability for HDB and many LTA/operator carparks, refreshed about
  every minute.
- EV charging availability where reported.

## Data sources

- HDB (Housing & Development Board) — carpark locations, capacity and live lots.
- URA (Urban Redevelopment Authority) — public carpark rates.
- LTA (Land Transport Authority) DataMall — carpark availability and rates.
- JTC and operator feeds for selected carparks.
- Rates are estimates for guidance; drivers should confirm at the gantry.

## Coverage

Singapore-wide, including HDB estates, URA public carparks, malls, and CBD/
commercial carparks.

## Key pages

- Home: https://wheretopark.sg/
- Sitemap: https://wheretopark.sg/sitemap.xml
- Parking near Orchard Road: https://wheretopark.sg/parking-near/orchard
- Parking near Marina Bay: https://wheretopark.sg/parking-near/marina-bay
- Parking in the CBD (Raffles Place): https://wheretopark.sg/parking-near/cbd
- Parking near Changi Airport & Jewel: https://wheretopark.sg/parking-near/changi-airport
- Parking near Tampines: https://wheretopark.sg/parking-near/tampines
- Parking near Jurong East: https://wheretopark.sg/parking-near/jurong-east

Each `/parking-near/{area}` page lists nearby carparks with rates and estimated
costs; each carpark has its own page at `/carpark/{slug}` with full rate tables.
